key_points: A political party is a group of people who come together to contest elections
Political parties aim to gain power and form the government
Political parties present policies and programmes to the public
Opposition parties criticize the government and suggest alternatives
examples: Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) is a national political party in India
Indian National Congress (INC) is another national political party
DMK is a regional party from Tamil Nadu
Regional parties focus mainly on state issues
formulas: Political Party = Leaders + Active Members + Followers
Government Formation = Party with Majority Seats
Coalition Government = Alliance of Multiple Parties
exam_tips: Remember the three components of a political party
Understand the difference between national and state parties
Learn examples of national and regional parties
Revise key functions of political parties
